content.en:
The ancient river of life.

One by one, the half-step sevenfold ancestors stayed in one area after another, absorbing the energy of the ancient river of life, although these half-step sevenfold ancestors absorbed more energy.

However, the energy contained in the Ancient River of Life itself was too majestic, and even if it was absorbed by this group of half-step sevenfold ancestors, it would not be able to absorb much.

Moreover, the energy of the ancient river of life is missing, and it can also absorb its own energy from the outside world and slowly recover its energy.

Therefore, as long as the number of half-step sevenfold ancestors is not too much, and the cultivation of the Dao Ancestors who enter is not high, it will not attract the attention of the Ancient River of Life.

As the years passed, a half-step sevenfold ancestor all showed a happy smile.

Especially some half-step sevenfold ancestors who have not made any progress for a long time, this time the life level has been improved, and the combat effectiveness has naturally increased a little, and it is a permanent improvement, which is suitable for any realm.

......

"The effect of the Life Ancient River energy on me has begun to decrease!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This situation is normal, although he has the life absorption of this Yuan Dao Ancestor endowment, the energy utilization of the Life Ancient River is very high, and the effect of the improvement is far beyond that of other Dao Ancestors, but there is still a limit.

And now, he is close to the limit of his improvement.

It won't be long before the energy of the Life Ancient River will not be able to raise his life level, unless he can also find other treasures that can be used to improve his life level.

Another period of time has passed.

On this day, Ye Tian clearly felt that his life level was almost at a stage of stagnation.

However, he still hasn't left, after all, if he leaves now, it will be too noticeable!

Therefore, Ye Tian continued to cultivate here, absorbing the energy of the Ancient River of Life, although there was almost no progress, but it was also possible to stabilize the life level.

However, it didn't take long for the ancient river of life to begin to shake.

......

"It's not good, the Ancient River of Life is shaking, this group of half-step Sevenfold Ancestors can't continue to stay, otherwise if the Ancient River of Life makes a move, all these little guys will have to die!"

Thereupon.

All the half-step sevenfold ancestors in the Ancient River of Life had received orders to leave the Ancient River of Life as soon as possible.

Woohoo!!

One by one, the half-step sevenfold ancestors left the Ancient River of Life, and immediately came to the place where the life level was tested, and they had to be tested one by one.

It's a rule, and they can't go against it.

Soon, a half-step sevenfold ancestor tested it.

Most of their life levels have increased by more than 0.5, and the best of them have even increased to 0.8, which is a huge improvement.

"Canggu Dao Ancestor!"

A Sevenfold Ancestor shouted.

At this time, Canggu Dao Ancestor went up to test.

A piece of data emerged.

【4.8】

Originally, Canggu Dao Ancestor's life level was 4.2, but now it has been increased to the level of 4.8, and the life level has increased by 0.6 all of a sudden, and the increase is okay.

Soon after, it was Ye Tian's turn to test.

Canggu Dao Ancestor stared at Ye Tian and said secretly: "Endless Dao Ancestor, at most you can increase your life level by 0.2! You can only increase your life level by 0.1!"

Ye Tian quickly conducted the test, and a piece of data appeared.

【6.5】

Seeing this data, all the Dao Ancestors couldn't believe it, and even the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor who was in charge of the test was dumbfounded!!

"How is this possible!!"

Canggu Dao Ancestor was stunned.

The higher the life level, the more difficult it is to improve, unless you break through the great realm!

But now, Ye Tian has actually raised his life level from 5.3 to 6.5 all at once, which is equivalent to raising his life level by 1.2 all at once.

This completely broke his cognition!

"How can this be, he is also a half-step sevenfold ancestor, and he is also a Dao ancestor who has comprehended the ninefold yuan dao, how can he improve his life level by 1.2, and he has improved so much on the basis of his life level of 5.3!!"

Canggu Dao Ancestor couldn't believe it, and other Dao Ancestors couldn't believe it either!

Obviously, everyone is the same demon, they are all Ninefold Yuan Dao Ancestors who are above other Dao Ancestors, and their talents have reached the top of the Hanhai District Realm.

But now, Ye Tian seemed to have completely crushed them.

......

"My life level has increased to 6.5, which is not bad!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The life level of 6.5 made his physical strength much stronger than before, and his strength naturally increased a lot!

At this time, the eyes of the other Dao Ancestors looking at him were full of envy, jealousy, and unknown eyes.

In addition, some Dao Ancestors came over one after another, greeted Ye Tian, and befriended Ye Tian.

And Ye Tian also responded one by one, after all, most of them were Dao Ancestors who had comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and it didn't hurt to make friends.

Subsequently, this group of Dao Ancestors left, but Ye Tian was left behind by a half-step Eightfold Ancestor.

This half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor is also the Dao Ancestor who has been sitting here for a long time, and has just made a move near the Ancient River of Life.

"I've seen Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled, why would Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor keep himself?

Although his life level this time is too eye-catching, this has nothing to do with Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor, he is the Dao Ancestor of Xuanyu Pavilion, is it difficult for Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor to win over himself?

"Endless Dao Ancestor, don't be nervous, I came to you for a good thing, and for you, it is a real big opportunity!" Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor smiled.

"Big chance?"

Ye Tian was a little unconvinced.

At this time, Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor said, "Endless Dao Ancestor, have you ever heard of the Nine-Fold Building?"

"Haven't heard of the Nine-Story Building!"

Ye Tian shook his head and said.

Gushan Daozu introduced: "I am a peripheral member of the Nine-Story Building, sitting at the boundary of the Hanhai District, and I am specially recruiting official members for the Nine-Story Building. Dao Ancestors like me who comprehend the Ninefold Yuan Dao are not qualified to truly enter the Ninefold Building, they can only be peripheral members forever, and there are certain criteria for officially joining the Ninefold Building, and the first criterion is that they must comprehend the Ninefold Yuan Dao. However, there are quite a few Dao Ancestors who have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, and there are many Hanhai District Boundaries alone, and there are too many large regional boundaries like the Hanhai District Boundary, so the number of Ninefold Yuan Dao is so large. Therefore, the second requirement is that the life level must be raised to above 6 in the half-step sevenfold ancestral realm. And if you meet these two requirements, you can become a full member of the Nine-Story Building!"

"But I've already joined the Xuanyu Pavilion......"

Ye Tian frowned.

"Hahahaha, it doesn't matter, the Xuanyu Pavilion itself is an idle force, and the first generation of the Xuanyu Pavilion Pavilion, its founder, Xuanyu Dao Ancestor, is now also a member of the Nine-Story Building. Don't compare the Nine Towers with these forces in the Hanhai District, they don't deserve it. Even if it is Hanhai Palace, it is just an ant in front of the Nine-Story Building. The Nine-Story Building not only has a large number of Eightfold Ancestors, but also Ninefold Ancestors. Gu Mountain Daozu said with a smile.

When Ye Tian heard this, he immediately gasped.

From this point of view, the strength of the nine-story building is terrifying to the extreme!

And now it seems that the No. 3 Sector Boundary is completely for the selection of members of the Nine-Story Building, so it's no wonder that you have to test your life level before entering the Ancient River of Life and after leaving the Ancient River of Life.

This must be the requirement of the nine-story building!

"Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor, can I reply later?"

Ye Tian asked.

Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor knew that Ye Tian had suspicions, so he needed to confirm it.

He was not in a hurry, so he said: "Yes, if you want to join the Nine Floors, you can contact me directly when the time comes!"
